name: Doomr.io
author: Poki
description: Doomr.io is an online multiplayer action game where only the true heroes survive! Dive into this intense game and put your survival and fighting skills to the ultimate test. Choose your mode: team up with other players to fight off waves of zombies and monsters, or jump into Battle Royale mode to prove you're the best fighter standing. Between battles, head back to camp to upgrade your gear and stock up on ammo. Are you ready to dominate the battlefield? How to play Doomr.io? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Attack: left click Who created Doomr.io? Doomr.io is created by Mod Studio Inc. Play their other games on Poki: Conq.io ! How can I play Doomr.io for free? You can play Doomr.io for free on Poki. Can I play Doomr.io on mobile devices and desktop? Doomr.io can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Doomr.io with my friend? Yes! Doomr.io is a multiplayer game so you can play with your friends online!
